steps.title: Do not solve farther than needed
steps.content: The equation is $4x-9=7$. Add $9$ to both sides to get $$4x=16.$$ The target expression is $4x+9$, so we can use $4x=16$ directly.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The answer is $25$. The value $4$ is $x$, but the question asks for $4x+9$. The value $13$ comes from finding $x$ and then adding $9$, and $-2$ has the wrong sign.
